entity.summary: Mexico-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in April 2014 and operating across Latin America with regulated international services.
entity.notes: Official tenth-anniversary material places Bitso's launch in April 2014 but does not state the exact day, so April 1 is used as a month-level placeholder. Current official material describes active exchange services and Gibraltar DLT regulation.

expected.summary: Mexico-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Bitso brand.

changes.summary: Mexico-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in April 2014 and operating across Latin America with regulated international services.
changes.notes: Official tenth-anniversary material places Bitso's launch in April 2014 but does not state the exact day, so April 1 is used as a month-level placeholder. Current official material describes active exchange services and Gibraltar DLT regulation.

events.title: Bitso launched in Mexico
events.description: Bitso launched in Mexico in April 2014 as a cryptocurrency exchange serving Latin American users.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker because reviewed official material does not state the exact day.

events.title: Bitso received a Gibraltar DLT provider licence
events.description: The Gibraltar Financial Services Commission awarded a full Distributed Ledger Technology provider licence to Bitso's Gibraltar operating entity.
events.notes: The licence supported Bitso's regulated international service structure and did not replace its Mexico-origin identity.

evidence.title: What is Bitso?
evidence.notes: Official help-center article states that Bitso emerged in 2014.

evidence.title: The Leading Cryptocurrency Platform In LATAM: 10 Years Of Bitso
evidence.notes: Official tenth-anniversary article places the platform launch in April 2014.

evidence.title: Bitso official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Bitso identity and active exchange services.

evidence.title: Is Bitso safe?
evidence.notes: Official help-center material states that Bitso holds a Gibraltar Distributed Ledger Technology license.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bitso
evidence.notes: Independent profile corroborates the Bitso identity, Mexico origin, and 2014 establishment year.

evidence.title: Mexican Crypto Exchange Bitso Awarded DLT Licence
evidence.notes: Government notice states that the GFSC awarded Bitso a full DLT licence.

evidence.title: The Badger Technology Company Limited regulated entity record
evidence.notes: GFSC regulated-entity record identifies Bitso's Gibraltar entity and official website.
